headline: Axon (AXON) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of self defense company AXON (NASDAQ:AXON) jumped 6.7% in the afternoon session after its president highlighted the rapid success of its counter-drone platform, Dedrone, which has already generated more bookings than its acquisition price.

headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slide As Rate Hike And Growth Worries Build
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Jun, 24 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts down about 1.5% and Nasdaq-100 futures weaker by more than 2.7%, as investors juggle two big forces. First, the US 10 year Treasury yield sits near 4.5%, which means higher borrowing costs for households and businesses and keeps the focus on a possible Federal Reserve rate hike in September. Second, Europe’s latest purchasing manager indexes show...

headline: Does Axon’s Upgraded Outlook and AI Push Reshape The Bull Case For Axon Enterprise (AXON)?
summary: Axon Enterprise recently reported strong Q1 2026 results, raised its full-year revenue outlook, and continued winning long-term public safety contracts while facing local political controversy in Scottsdale over a proposed development project. The company is rapidly building an AI-powered public safety platform, spanning TASER 10, Axon Body 4, counter-drone systems, and tools like Axon Assistant and Axon Vision, that aims to lock in agencies through integrated hardware, software, and cloud...
